retry_reason: Failure (return of NULL) means no matching device exists at this moment; retrying may succeed if the device appears later, but the wrapper itself does not indicate a transient refcount error—callers typically do not retry.
contract_summary: This is a get-wrapper that searches for the first ACPI device matching the given HID, UID, and HRV. It returns the device with an incremented reference count; the caller must call acpi_dev_put() to release the reference when done. If no matching device is found, it returns NULL, indicating absence rather than an error. The caller should check the return value before using the device.
